subject: New! Possibly the world’s best Undecylenic Acid | Greatlife.eu 💚
body:

[Undecylenic Acid](https://www.greatlife.eu/undecylenic-acid-greatlife)

 

Powerful Undecylenic Acid with 250 mg per Softgel

 

Possibly the world’s best Undecylenic Acid at a great price!

As you may know, we have stopped selling Thorne because their quality has declined in recent years. Greatlife should be associated with the very best available, and unfortunately Thorne no longer meets that standard today.

Undecylenic Acid (250 mg/cap) from Greatlife contains the same active ingredient as Undecylenic Acid (formerly Formula SF722) from Thorne: undecylenic acid. It counteracts Candida significantly better than caprylic acid and is extremely effective against various types of fungal overgrowth in the body. Why is our Undecylenic Acid better than Thorne’s?

In addition to being much more powerful with 250 mg per softgel instead of 50 mg, our formula is carefully designed. Right now you can purchase our Undecylenic Acid at a special price of €49,99 (regular price €59,99).

[Buy Undecylenic Acid (250 mg/cap)](https://www.greatlife.eu/undecylenic-acid-greatlife)

 

 

[Undecylenic Acid](https://www.greatlife.eu/undecylenic-acid-greatlife)

Why is our Undecylenic Acid better than Thorne’s? 
 
Better protection against oxidation (crucial for undecylenic acid)
Undecylenic acid is an unsaturated fatty acid that is sensitive to oxidation. Greatlife’s Undecylenic Acid includes antioxidant protection that provides greater stability, longer shelf life, and preserved biological activity. D-alpha-tocopherol (vitamin E) acts as a powerful fat-soluble antioxidant that protects undecylenic acid from oxidation. Rosemary extract contains natural polyphenols (such as carnosol and rosmarinic acid) that further stabilize fatty acids.

A more stable oil base for the active ingredient
In Greatlife’s Undecylenic Acid, the oil works together with antioxidants, making it an active carrier rather than just a filler. It protects, stabilizes, and helps deliver undecylenic acid in a more intact and effective form. In simpler formulations without antioxidants, the oil mainly functions as a passive filler. In this formulation, it directly contributes to the product’s quality, stability, and effectiveness. This reduces the risk of rancidity and quality deterioration over time and helps keep the undecylenic acid chemically intact and effective for longer.
 
Less water = better for fatty acids
Undecylenic Acid from Thorne contains purified water in the capsule material. Water increases the risk of:
• Hydrolytic degradation
• Microbial instability
• Reduced fatty acid quality over time
 
Undecylenic Acid from Greatlife:
• Uses vegetable glycerin without added water in the filling
• Creates a drier and more stable environment for the undecylenic acid
• This is particularly important for a fat-based antifungal compound.

Better tolerance and topical use
Undecylenic acid is often used both internally and externally (for example, for topical use in cases of nail fungus). Greatlife’s Undecylenic Acid contains skin-friendly lipids in the form of extra virgin olive oil, complemented by fat-soluble antioxidants that contribute to stability and good tolerance—even for topical use.
This makes it more suitable for topical application when needed compared with Thorne’s Undecylenic Acid.
 
Fewer capsules but a higher dose
To reach 1000 mg of undecylenic acid, you previously needed 20 softgels of Thorne, whereas only 4 softgels of Greatlife’s Undecylenic Acid are required.

Functional quality
With Greatlife’s Undecylenic Acid, we have:
• Considered fatty acid chemistry
• Focused on stability and bioactivity
• Formulated primarily for function, not just content

Thorne’s Undecylenic Acid is functional but more basic, whereas Greatlife’s Undecylenic Acid is a premium product and simply a better undecylenic acid supplement.
 

 

We also offer a free Candida and fungal protocol if you would like one. Email us and we will send it to you immediately—completely free of charge. 

[Contact us →](mailto:info@greatlife.eu)

 

 

[Undecylenic Acid](https://www.greatlife.eu/undecylenic-acid-greatlife)

Undecylenic Acid (250 mg/cap)
– one of our best supplements for combating fungal issues
 
Reg. price €59,99
NOW €49,99
 
Undecylenic acid from Greatlife helps counteract fungal overgrowth, such as Candida, in the gastrointestinal tract. Undecylenic acid has traditionally been used to promote a healthy microbial environment and may support gut function during imbalances. 

[Buy now](https://www.greatlife.eu/undecylenic-acid-greatlife)
